chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَدَلُّ بِهِ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى الْمَحْمَدَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – What the praiseworthiness is evidenced by from the the woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/27)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/27)
text: مِنْ سَعَادَةِ الرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَكْشِفَ الثَّوْبَ عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ بَيْضَاءَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Bakr Bin Salih, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘From the happiness of the man is that he moves aside the veil of a woman and finds her white’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Marry blue colored eyes; it is a sign of good fortune.’”
